packages.title: Flexible
packages.description: For quick wins and focused tasks. Book a designer for a day.

packages.title: Short Term
packages.description: For ongoing projects that need consistent design support.

packages.title: Long Term
packages.description: For long-term partnerships with a dedicated design resource.

designSprint.title: Design Sprint
designSprint.description: A structured 5-day process to rapidly solve a design challenge. From problem definition to a tested prototype in one week.
features: Day 1: Understand — Map the problem, define the challenge
Day 2: Diverge — Explore solutions, sketch ideas
Day 3: Decide — Choose the best direction, create a storyboard
Day 4: Prototype — Build a realistic, clickable prototype
Day 5: Test — Validate with real users, gather insights
